title: Spear Plugin
description: This project is a 1.21+ compatible plugin for the brand new Spear.
body:
**DO NOT DM BLASTY FOR A TEXTURE HE DOESNT HAVE ONE ONLY DM HIM IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE IN MAKING A PACK**
This plugin is a replica of the brand new minecraft version. However the spear is now avilable for 1.21+. In order to get the spear you have to do 
/spear <1-5>
1 = Wooden Spear
2 = Gold Spear
3 = Iron Spear
4 = Diamond Spear
5 = Netherite Spear

The plugin can support Jab attacks(Left Click) and the swoosh attack(Right Click). Damage is also scaled based on player velocity.

There is no Texture pack -- I don't know how to make one (If you do then join my discord and create a ticket)

If you want to make your own texture pack the custom model data for each of the spear is the same as the /spear command, aka cmd 1 is wooden spear...
